title: Create two React UI components for Development Department plugin phases
job:
Create two React components for the Development Department plugin.

1. Create plugins/dev-department/src/ui/components/PhaseList.tsx:
Ordered list of phases showing: phase number, title, status badge, freeze state indicator, spec/PRD presence icons. Add Phase button, Delete per phase, Move Up/Move Down for reorder. Click phase to select. Props: phases array, onSelect, onAdd, onDelete, onReorder. Import Phase from ../../worker/types.

2. Create plugins/dev-department/src/ui/components/PhaseDetail.tsx:
Edit single phase: title, objective, description, phase number, status dropdown, freeze state dropdown, prerequisites, success criteria, risk notes textareas. Read-only linked Spec and PRD sections. Grayed-out placeholders for Build Output, Review, Revision Events. Save and Cancel buttons. Props: phase, spec, prd, onSave. Import types from ../../worker/types.

Inline styles. TypeScript. Commit both files.
